# Chic Nail & Head Spa

> Boutique nail salon and Japanese-style head spa in Plain City, Ohio. Luxury nail
> care — pedicures, manicures, gel extensions, dip powder, acrylic, nail art — plus
> waxing and kids' services. A restorative Japanese head spa opens soon.

- Address: 12076 Sycamore Trace, Plain City, OH 43064
- Phone: (614) 389-9999
- Email: Chicnailheadspa@gmail.com
- Hours: Mon–Fri 10am–7pm · Sat 10am–6pm · Sun 11am–5pm
- Book online: https://githubosu.github.io/chicnailheadspa-v2/book.html
- Walk-ins welcome. All prices are starting rates.

## Services & Pricing

- [Full service menu](https://githubosu.github.io/chicnailheadspa-v2/services-accordion.html): every service with prices and descriptions
- [Pedicures](https://githubosu.github.io/chicnailheadspa-v2/pedicure.html): Chic Ritual $68 (60 min), The Essential $48, The Renewal $58, The Paraffin Luxe $82, Chic Signature $90. Gel color +$20; gel removal and regular polish included.
- [Manicures](https://githubosu.github.io/chicnailheadspa-v2/manicure.html): Gel Manicure $46, Manicure Regular Polish $30, Manicure Regular Polish + Removal $40
- [Gel extensions](https://githubosu.github.io/chicnailheadspa-v2/gel-x.html): builder gel, tap gel and Gel X full sets & fills, from $60
- [Dip powder](https://githubosu.github.io/chicnailheadspa-v2/dip-powder.html): from $56
- [Acrylic](https://githubosu.github.io/chicnailheadspa-v2/acrylic.html): full sets, fills, ombré and pink & white, from $56
- [Nail art](https://githubosu.github.io/chicnailheadspa-v2/nail-art.html): chrome, cat eye, design French, and custom hand-painted sets from $12
- [Waxing](https://githubosu.github.io/chicnailheadspa-v2/waxing.html): brows to full legs
- [Kids](https://githubosu.github.io/chicnailheadspa-v2/kids.html): ages 10 & under
- [Extras & add-ons](https://githubosu.github.io/chicnailheadspa-v2/extras.html): polish changes, cuticle care, repairs, removals
- [Head spa](https://githubosu.github.io/chicnailheadspa-v2/head-spa.html): Japanese-style scalp rituals — coming soon

## Pages

- [Home](https://githubosu.github.io/chicnailheadspa-v2/): overview, seasonal design gallery, hours & directions
- [Book online](https://githubosu.github.io/chicnailheadspa-v2/book.html): reserve an appointment
